metadata.title: Mosaiko — Custom Photo Fridge Magnets
metadata.description: Turn your favorite photos into magnetic fridge mosaics. Choose your design, upload your photo, and get your magnets delivered.

announcement.text: Free shipping on all orders — Customize your magnets today!

termsPage.metaDescription: Read Mosaiko's terms and conditions for our custom photo magnet store.
termsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
termsPage.intro: By accessing and using the Mosaiko website (hereinafter, "the Site"), you agree to these terms and conditions. If you disagree, please do not use the Site.
termsPage.section1Text: Mosaiko is an online store dedicated to selling custom fridge magnets. We operate from Mexico and our services are primarily directed at users within the Mexican Republic.
termsPage.section2Text: You agree to use the Site lawfully and in accordance with these terms. The use of the Site for illegal purposes, the transmission of offensive content, or interference with its operation is prohibited.
termsPage.section3Text: Products shown are subject to availability. We reserve the right to reject or cancel orders due to availability, pricing errors, or other circumstances. By placing an order, you confirm that the information provided is accurate and complete.
termsPage.section4Text: All prices are expressed in Mexican Pesos (MXN) and include VAT. We accept credit/debit cards, OXXO, and bank transfers (SPEI). Payment is charged at the time of order confirmation.
termsPage.section5Text: We offer free shipping throughout Mexico. Estimated delivery times are 5 to 10 business days after order confirmation. Times may vary depending on location and courier service availability.
termsPage.section6Text: If you are not satisfied with your purchase, you may request a return within 30 days of receiving your order. The product must be in its original packaging and in good condition. For custom products, returns apply only for manufacturing defects.
termsPage.section7Text: All content on the Site, including text, images, logos, designs, and source code, is the property of Mosaiko or used with authorization. By uploading images to customize products, you confirm that you have the necessary rights to those images.
termsPage.section8Text: Mosaiko shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the Site. We strive to keep information accurate and up to date, but do not guarantee that the Site will be free of errors or interruptions.
termsPage.section9Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the Site. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.
termsPage.section10Text: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Mexican States. For any dispute, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Mexico City.
termsPage.contactInfo: If you have questions about these terms, contact us through our contact page.

privacyPage.metaDescription: Learn how Mosaiko collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Mosaiko, your privacy is important to us. This policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our website and services.
privacyPage.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, shipping address, phone number, and payment information when making a purchase. We also collect the images you upload to customize your products.
privacyPage.section2Text: When you visit our Site, we automatically collect certain information through cookies and similar technologies, including your IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent, and referral data. We use Google Analytics to analyze site traffic.
privacyPage.section3Text: We use your information to process and ship your orders, communicate with you about your purchase, improve our products and services, personalize your experience on the Site, send marketing communications (with your consent), and comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.section4Text: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We share information only with service providers necessary to operate our business (payment processing via Stripe, email via Resend, hosting via Vercel and Supabase), and when required by law.
privacyPage.section5Text: We use essential cookies for Site functionality, analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to understand Site usage, and marketing cookies (Google Ads) to show relevant ads. You can manage your cookie preferences from our cookie banner.
privacyPage.section6Text: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration. Payments are processed securely through Stripe, which complies with PCI DSS standards.
privacyPage.section7Text: In accordance with Mexico's Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP), you have the right to access, rectify, cancel, and oppose the processing of your personal data (ARCO rights). To exercise these rights, contact us through our contact page.
privacyPage.section8Text: We retain your personal information as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy or as required by law. Images uploaded for customization are stored securely and deleted 90 days after order completion.
privacyPage.section9Text: Our services are not directed at persons under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect information from minors. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it immediately.
privacyPage.section10Text: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through a notice on the Site. We recommend reviewing this page regularly.
privacyPage.contactInfo: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us through our contact page.

cookiePolicyPage.metaDescription: Information about how Mosaiko uses cookies and similar technologies on its website.
cookiePolicyPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicyPage.intro: This policy explains how Mosaiko uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website. By continuing to browse, you accept the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
cookiePolicyPage.section1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow the site to remember your actions and preferences over a period of time, so you don't have to configure them each time you return.
cookiePolicyPage.section2Intro: We use the following types of cookies:
cookiePolicyPage.essentialText: Required for basic Site functionality. These include session cookies, language preferences, and cookie consent. They cannot be disabled.
cookiePolicyPage.analyticsText: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our Site. These cookies collect anonymous information such as pages visited, time spent, and traffic source.
cookiePolicyPage.marketingText: We use Google Ads cookies to show you relevant ads based on your interests. These cookies track your activity across different websites to offer personalized advertising.
cookiePolicyPage.section3Text: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our cookie settings banner. You can also configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect Site functionality.
cookiePolicyPage.section4Text: Some third-party services we use may set their own cookies. We recommend consulting Google Analytics and Google Ads privacy policies for more information on how they handle your data.
cookiePolicyPage.section5Text: We may update this cookie policy periodically to reflect changes in the cookies we use. We recommend reviewing this page regularly.
cookiePolicyPage.contactInfo: For questions about our cookie policy, contact us through our contact page.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn the story behind Mosaiko, custom magnets that transform your memories into magnetic art.
aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: We transform your favorite memories into magnetic art you can touch, share, and enjoy every day
aboutPage.storyP1: Mosaiko was born from a simple but powerful idea: that your most special photos shouldn't stay trapped in your phone. They deserve a place in your home, where you can see them and smile every day.
aboutPage.storyP2: From Mexico, we create high-quality custom magnets that turn any image into a unique mosaic for your fridge. Each piece is printed with cutting-edge technology on premium magnetic material.
aboutPage.storyP3: What started as a personal project has become a way to connect people with their most precious moments, one photo at a time.
aboutPage.value1Text: Every magnet is produced with the best materials and inspected before shipping. We don't cut corners.
aboutPage.value2Text: We're proudly Mexican. Every product reflects our passion for detail and the warmth of our culture.
aboutPage.value3Text: If something doesn't delight you, we'll fix it. Your happiness with the product is our number one priority.
aboutPage.value4Text: We believe personalized art should be for everyone. Fair prices, free shipping, and a super easy process.
aboutPage.promiseText: Every mosaic we create carries a piece of your story. We commit to treating it with the care it deserves — from the moment you upload your photo to when you open your package at home.

faqPage.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about Mosaiko's custom photo fridge magnets.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about your custom magnets
faqPage.a1: They are magnetic fridge magnets that split a photo into multiple pieces (3, 4, 6, or 9), creating a unique mosaic. Each piece is an individual magnet that you can arrange on your fridge.
faqPage.a2: Each individual piece measures approximately 5×5 cm. The total size of the complete mosaic depends on the number of pieces you choose. For example, a 9-piece mosaic (3×3) measures approximately 15×15 cm.
faqPage.q3: What kind of photos can I use?
faqPage.a3: You can use any digital photo: selfies, landscapes, family photos, pets, art, memes — whatever you want! We recommend images with good resolution (at least 1000×1000 pixels) for best results.
faqPage.a4: Prices vary depending on the number of pieces. Check our customization page for current prices. All prices include VAT and free shipping.
faqPage.a5: Estimated delivery time is 5 to 10 business days after confirming your order. We offer free shipping throughout Mexico.
faqPage.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.a6: We accept credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), OXXO payments, and bank transfers (SPEI). All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
faqPage.a7: Yes. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, you can request a return within 30 days of receipt. For custom products, returns apply for manufacturing defects. Contact us and we'll resolve it.
faqPage.a8: Excellent! We use high-resolution printing on premium, durable magnetic material. Colors are vibrant and water-resistant. Our magnets are designed to last for years.
faqPage.q9: Can I order as a gift?
faqPage.a9: Absolutely! Mosaic magnets make an original, personalized gift. You can ship the order directly to the recipient's address. We'll soon have the option to include a personalized message.
faqPage.a10: You can write to us through our contact page, send us a message on WhatsApp, or follow us on social media. We respond within 24 hours.
faqPage.stillQuestionsText: Don't hesitate to reach out. We're here to help.

contactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with the Mosaiko team. We're here to help with your custom magnets.
